privileged_info_summary: The data is synthetically generated using a Python script in setup_task.sh. The script simulates 24 realistic participants (p01 to p24) and injects one contaminated participant (p00) with 100% accuracy on all trials. The tested lags are 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, and 8. The final JSON report must be saved to /home/ga/pebl/analysis/ab_report.json.
